'''jazhudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okapi|okapi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okapi|okapi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jazhudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || jæzhidith || jæzhidij || jæzhidish || jæzhidi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || jazhuzhuduth || jazhuzhuduj || jazhuzhudush || jazhuzhudu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || jazhuduth || jazhuduj || jazhudush || jazhudu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || jazhufdufth || jazhufdufj || jazhufdufsh || jazhufduf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jazhuduthu || jazhuduju || jazhudushu || jazhuduku
|-
| [[Patient]] || jazhuduth || jazhuduj || jazhudush || jazhudu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jazhuduthul || jazhudujul || jazhudushul || jazhudukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jazhuduuthuthu || jazhuduujuju || jazhuduushushu || jazhuduuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || jazhuduthun || jazhudujun || jazhudushun || jazhudukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jazhuduthuoro || jazhudujuoro || jazhudushuoro || jazhudukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
